  "findings": [
    "No pre-task photos or field verification confirm working clearance per NEC 110.26 is maintained.",
    "Absence of evidence that panelboard interior is guarded against inadvertent contact with live parts during makeup.",
    "Lack of visual confirmation that approved PPE and access control measures are deployed despite in-progress status."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cease panelboard makeup until 110.26 working clearance is established and documented.",
    "Install temporary barriers, covers, or insulating mats to protect against contact with energized parts.",
    "Verify crew is wearing arc-rated PPE appropriate for the incident energy level.",
    "Re-brief crew on NEC Art. 408 installation requirements and update daily briefing form with control measures."
  ],
  "rationale": "The scenario describes only pre-task planning artifacts but asks for an assessment of in-progress panelboard installation. Without field-verified working space, protective guarding, and proper access controls, the condition violates NEC 110.26 and NEC Art. 408 safe installation practices. This presents a high risk of arc-flash or electrical contact during makeup.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.26 (Working Space about Electrical Equipment)",
    "NEC Art. 408 (Switchboards, Switchgear, and Panelboards)",
    "NFPA 70E (Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace)"
  ]
}
